repository_policy: Prefer a public DOI-backed repository for de-identified processed tables, figure source data, analysis code, and synthetic fixtures. Raw identifiable eye-tracking, EEG, and questionnaire exports should be listed as restricted unless consent and ethics approval allow public release.

datasets.label: Raw questionnaire export
datasets.manuscript_use: Subjective S1-S5 outcomes, B1-B3 supplementary items, demographics, and experience-group covariates.

datasets.label: Raw eye-tracking scene files and AOI definitions
datasets.manuscript_use: AOI visited, fixation count rate, total fixation duration, time to first fixation, attention share, and AOI validity.

datasets.label: EEG scene-level metric export
datasets.manuscript_use: Theta/alpha EEG outcomes and EEG-eye synchronization evidence.

datasets.label: Canonical multimodal analysis table
datasets.manuscript_use: Primary statistical models, robustness diagnostics, and reviewer-response evidence.

datasets.label: Figure and table source data
datasets.manuscript_use: Source data underlying manuscript figures, figure QA, paper tables, and response-to-reviewers material.
